figures.caption: Table 3. Results of PPA metrics on seven unseen designs of ICCAD 2015 of method MaskPlace [17], EfficientPlace [10], DREAMPlace 4.1.0 [18], EIM-D, and EIM-P. The reward models obtained from EIM-D and EIM-P are trained on the superblue1.

Figure 1. Illustration of our proposed framework. Instead of manually formalizing intricate expert knowledge, we circumvent this by directly learning from the final expert layouts to derive a reward model. The visualizations of design superblue18 of MaskPlace [17], EfficientPlace [10], DREAMPlace 4.1.0 [18], EIM-D, EIM-P and Expert are illustrated. The reward models of EIM-D and EIM-P are trained on design superblue1.
